commands.review_summary:
The PR removes underscore-dangle allow-list entries and renames matching private/local state variables in UI chat, dreaming, app render, QQBot, and gateway auth status code.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a cleanup PR, not a bug report with a failing user path. The relevant check is source review plus lint proof that the renamed identifiers no longer require exceptions.
commands.review_followup: No automated repair is needed; the protected maintainer label leaves the next action as explicit maintainer review or merge handling.

target.title: chore(lint): reduce underscore-dangle exceptions
target.body:
## Summary
- Remove 23 eslint/no-underscore-dangle allow-list entries.
- Rename local UI state, chat helper fields, and exhaustive-check locals to non-underscore names.
- Keep the cleanup mechanical and scoped to already-covered surfaces.

## Verification
- node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/dreaming.test.ts ui/src/ui/chat/slash-commands.node.test.ts ui/src/ui/views/chat.test.ts ui/src/ui/app-render.helpers.node.test.ts
- pnpm changed:lanes --json
- pnpm check:changed via Blacksmith Testbox tbx_01krx6sa64yze4ywx9prm7ak97, Actions run https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/actions/runs/26025206841
- codex review --uncommitted

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: reduce the underscore-dangle exception list after enabling the lint rule in #83422.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout plus Blacksmith Testbox.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs after the patch, plus focused Vitest and check:changed.
Evidence after fix: copied terminal output from the after-fix lint run:

```text
Found 0 warnings and 0 errors.
Finished in 18.9s on 14838 files with 217 rules using 1 threads.
```

Observed result after fix: the removed exception names are no longer needed; the touched UI/chat/plugin/gateway files lint clean and the Testbox check:changed run passed on tbx_01krx6sa64yze4ywx9prm7ak97.
What was not tested: full repository test suite beyond check:changed selected lanes.
